title: Active context pollution: duplicates and contradictions
evidence: L3 context showed same subway order stored 3+ times with different markers; same research deadline stored 10 times with unique tags
root_cause_026b: _is_l3_duplicate compared content[:120] literally — trailing markers like marker_abc123 made identical facts look distinct within the 120-char window
root_cause_026c: No merge semantics for profile data — every profile write inserted a new row, fragmenting identity facts across N entries
fix_026b: Added _normalize_for_dedup() static method that strips trailing marker/unique-tag patterns via _MARKER_RE before the 120-char prefix comparison. Both stored and incoming content are normalised before comparing.
fix_026c: Added _merge_profile() that detects an existing profile_structured row in SQLite, merges incoming JSON into it (incoming keys win), updates in-place. memory_write dispatches to _merge_profile before the normal insert path when category=='profile_structured'.
